plugins.name: anhurdb-memory
plugins.description: AnhurDB as Claude Code's persistent, sovereign long-term memory: auto-recall at session start, deterministic auto-persist each turn and at session end, no-silent-loss disk queue + retry. Bundles the AnhurDB MCP tools for explicit recall/store during a session.

plugins.name: anhurdb-memory-hermes
plugins.description: The Hermes memory identity: the same AnhurDB long-term-memory engine as anhurdb-memory, pointed at a SEPARATE tenant + container (hermes-ltm) + state dir (~/.anhur-hermes-memory) so a second agent's memory never mixes with the default. Auto-recall, deterministic auto-persist, no-silent-loss disk queue + retry, and the AnhurDB MCP tools.
